# atlassian_jira_project (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jira Cloud project by key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "atlassian_jira_project" "example" {
  key = "PROJ"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The project key to look up (e.g. "PROJ").

### Read-Only

- `assignee_type` (String) The default assignee type (e.g. PROJECT_LEAD, UNASSIGNED).
- `description` (String) The description of the project.
- `id` (String) The ID of the project.
- `lead_account_id` (String) The account ID of the project lead.
- `name` (String) The name of the project.
- `project_type_key` (String) The project type key (e.g. software, service_desk, business).
